mapping_description:
Created By : Swati Jain
Created On : 20-Feb-2012
Mapping Description : Data is being moved from the Source ( CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS ) from ODS R12 to Target Flat File(FF_CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.CREATION_DATE, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.CREATED_BY, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.RECEIPT_SOURCE_CODE, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.VENDOR_ID, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.VENDOR_SITE_ID, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.ORGANIZATION_ID, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.SHIPMENT_NUM, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.RECEIPT_NUM, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.SHIP_TO_LOCATION_ID, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.BILL_OF_LADING, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.PACKING_SLIP, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.SHIPPED_DATE, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.FREIGHT_CARRIER_CODE, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.EXPECTED_RECEIPT_DATE, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.EMPLOYEE_ID, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.NUM_OF_CONTAINERS, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.WAYBILL_AIRBILL_NUM, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.COMMENTS, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE1, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE2, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE3, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE4, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE5, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE6, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE7, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE8, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE9, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE10, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE11, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE12, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE13, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE14, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.ATTRIBUTE15, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.GOVERNMENT_CONTEXT, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.REQUEST_ID, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.PROGRAM_ID, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.ASN_TYPE, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.EDI_CONTROL_NUM, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.NOTICE_CREATION_DATE, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.GROSS_WEIGHT, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.GROSS_WEIGHT_UOM_CODE, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.NET_WEIGHT, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.NET_WEIGHT_UOM_CODE, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.TAR_WEIGHT, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.TAR_WEIGHT_UOM_CODE, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.PACKAGING_CODE, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.CARRIER_METHOD, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.CARRIER_EQUIPMENT, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.CARRIER_EQUIPMENT_NUM, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.CARRIER_EQUIPMENT_ALPHA, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.SPECIAL_HANDLING_CODE, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.HAZARD_CODE, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.HAZARD_CLASS, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.HAZARD_DESCRIPTION, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.FREIGHT_TERMS, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.FREIGHT_BILL_NUMBER, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.INVOICE_NUM, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.INVOICE_DATE, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.INVOICE_AMOUNT, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.TAX_NAME, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.TAX_AMOUNT, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.FREIGHT_AMOUNT, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.INVOICE_STATUS_CODE, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.ASN_STATUS, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.CURRENCY_CODE, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.CONVERSION_RATE_TYPE, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.CONVERSION_RATE, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.CONVERSION_DATE, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.PAYMENT_TERMS_ID, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.MRC_CONVERSION_RATE_TYPE, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.MRC_CONVERSION_DATE, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.MRC_CONVERSION_RATE, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.CUSTOMER_ID, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.CUSTOMER_SITE_ID, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.REMIT_TO_SITE_ID, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.SHIP_FROM_LOCATION_ID, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.WF_ITEM_TYPE, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.WF_ITEM_KEY, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.APPROVAL_STATUS, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.PERFORMANCE_PERIOD_FROM, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.PERFORMANCE_PERIOD_TO, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.REQUEST_DATE, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.GES_UPDATE_DATE, CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.GLOBAL_NAME 
FROM
 CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS 
WHERE
 CG1_RCV_SHIPMENT_HEADERS.GES_UPDATE_DATE>'$$LastExtractDate'
